creator: asmodai@wxs.nl
text:
* buddabud@hotmail.com (buddabud@hotmail.com) [990625 17:46]:
> 
> After I finish the install questions and it creates a new root file 
> system on my D: drive, the extraction menu comes up and it just hangs.

You are being very sparse here.

Have you tried to look at vty2 using ALT-F2?
Also, have you tried enabling debug messages and actively monitor
the vty2?

My best guess is that something went wrong creating slices and the
partitions inside those slices.

Have you consulted the FAQ and the handbook at www.freebsd.org as well
prior to reporting?

Please do so and report the results back and make sure you use the same 
subject and include the freebsd-gnats-submit in the reply in order to track
this problem.

HTH and awaiting your feedback,

-- 
Jeroen Ruigrok van der Werven                asmodai(at)wxs.nl
        The *BSD Programmer's Documentation Project 
Network/Security Specialist      <http://home.wxs.nl/~asmodai>
*BSD: We are back and will not accept no...
